name: ClawLens
description: Agent observability and guardrails for OpenClaw — risk scoring, audit trails, dashboard

llmEvalThreshold.description: Score threshold above which opt-in LLM evaluation runs when risk.llmEnabled is true. Does not gate guardrail matching or Attention Inbox freshness.

llmEnabled.description: Default false. When true, ClawLens sends sanitized tool-call metadata to the user's configured OpenClaw LLM provider for risk evaluation.

llmProvider.description: Deprecated no-op in v1.0.1. ClawLens ignores this value and uses OpenClaw's configured model/auth runtime when risk.llmEnabled is true. Remove this setting from your config before v1.1.0.

llmModel.description: Deprecated no-op in v1.0.1. ClawLens ignores this value and uses OpenClaw's configured model/auth runtime when risk.llmEnabled is true. Remove this setting from your config before v1.1.0.

llmApiKeyEnv.description: Deprecated no-op in v1.0.1. ClawLens does not read LLM API keys from environment variables. Remove this setting from your config before v1.1.0.

enabled.description: Disabled by default. When true, ClawLens emits redacted local/gateway alerts for high-risk actions.

threshold.description: Score threshold for generic high-risk alerts (only used when alerts.enabled=true). Does not control guardrails or LLM evaluation.

includeParamValues.description: Default false. When true, alert messages may include sanitized command, path, URL, or channel details. Credential patterns are always redacted upstream.

dashboardUrl.description: Optional override for dashboard URL used in alert links
